evidence: CRM stage history is a data layer; coordinator visibility requires a UI surface (not yet built — out of sprint scope)
SoA billable leakage items surface through financial runtime leakage engine (existing leakage UI)
Communications lifecycle actions route through existing /communications/settings UI
dod_1_coordinator_visible.notes: Integration bridges are data and computation layers by design. UI surfaces exist for financial leakage; CRM history UI is post-sprint scope.

evidence: Vitalis subject attribution links patient_leads to study_subjects via bidirectional FK (migration 0199)
Subject workspace inherits CRM attribution through the linked patient_lead_id column
No new action queues created — integration bridges are read/compute layers
SoA leakage items surface through existing RevenueLeakageItem pipeline
soa_billable_pending leakage kind added to RevenueLeakageKind
Leakage items flow through computeStudyFinancialSummary and surface in existing command center leakage panel

tasks.title: ClinIQ → Financial Runtime (SoA billables + leakage engine)
tasks.notes: Bridge queries expected_billables (ClinIQ schema uses TEXT study_id, not UUID). loadPendingSoaBillables, triggerSoaBillable, summarizeSoaBillables, soaBillablesToLeakageItems. StudyFinancialSummary gains soaBillables field.

tasks.title: Vitalis → Subject attribution
tasks.notes: Bidirectional link: patient_leads.linked_subject_id (existing) + study_subjects.patient_lead_id (new). link-lead-to-subject writes both directions atomically. Partial index on patient_lead_id WHERE NOT NULL.

tasks.title: CRM v0 → v1 (stage history)
tasks.notes: patient_lead_stage_history table records every stage transition with actor, reason, metadata. Enrollment confirmation auto-records a 'randomized' transition. RLS: select + insert for active org members.

tasks.title: Communications email provider lifecycle
tasks.notes: archiveCommunicationMailboxAction: sets archived_at, blocks sync. reactivateCommunicationMailboxAction: clears archived_at, sets status to pending. Both redirect to settings with result param.
